channel.title: 6-8 件事 (2026/5/3)
channel.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈围绕“AI + 代码”这个话题讨论得相当热烈。从人人可用的本地 Coding Agent，到关于 AI 编程质量的大佬对话，再到各种基于 Codex 的实战技巧，信息量很大。别错过下面这几个重点，尤其是那个能让你在本地跑满血 AI 编程助手的项目，还有关于 AI 编程是把“双刃剑”的深度讨论，都值得花时间看看。

item.title: 6-8 件事
item.description: 嘿，今天的技术圈围绕“AI + 代码”这个话题讨论得相当热烈。从人人可用的本地 Coding Agent，到关于 AI 编程质量的大佬对话，再到各种基于 Codex 的实战技巧，信息量很大。别错过下面这几个重点，尤其是那个能让你在本地跑满血 AI 编程助手的项目，还有关于 AI 编程是把“双刃剑”的深度讨论，都值得花时间看看。

item.title: nexu-io/open-design
item.description: 🎨 Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI. | 近期热门 | 总 16420 stars
item.author: nexu-io

item.title: denuitt1/mhr-cfw
item.description: A Domain-Fronting Relay that routes traffic though GAS (Google Apps Script) and forwards it to Cloudflare Workers. Designed to bypass DPI. | 近期热门 | 总 1710 stars
item.author: denuitt1

item.title: willchen96/mike
item.description: OSS AI Legal Platform | 近期热门 | 总 1432 stars
item.author: willchen96

item.title: endless-sky-team/ai-trading-agent
item.description: llm trading bot ai agent crypto bitcoin ethereum perpetuals openrouter lighter algorithmic automated quant typescript react postgres bun fintech defi machine-learning open-source crypto-bot signals | 近期热门 | 总 195 stars
item.author: endless-sky-team

item.title: matthart1983/syswatch
item.description: Single-host system diagnostics TUI. Sibling to netwatch. Twelve tabs, plain-English insights, session scrubber. macOS + Linux. | 近期热门 | 总 132 stars
item.author: matthart1983

item.title: StartupHakk/OpenMonoAgent.ai
item.description: AI shouldn't have a meter. Unlimited tokens. Forever. Your machine. Your agent. Use it from anywhere. Terminal-native coding agent powered by local LLMs — 100% open source, free forever, and installed with a single command. Proudly built on C#/.NET, because AI tooling should be infrastructure, not a subscription. | 近期热门 | 总 100 stars
item.author: StartupHakk

item.title: kyutai-labs/moshi-rag
item.description: MoshiRAG is a compact full-duplex speech language model augmented with asynchronous knowledge retrieval to improve factuality without sacrificing real-time interactivity. | 近期热门 | 总 59 stars
item.author: kyutai-labs

item.title: zhu1090093659/deepseek-pp
item.description: 🧠 为 DeepSeek 网页版注入 Agentic 记忆系统 + Skill 技能系统的 Chrome 扩展 | 近期热门 | 总 59 stars
item.author: zhu1090093659
